nasb.text: And He was stating the matter plainly. And Peter took Him aside and began to rebuke Him.

esv.text: And he said this plainly. And Peter took him aside and began to rebuke him.

cnv.text: 耶穌坦白地說了這話，彼得就把他拉到一邊，責怪他。

ccb.text: 耶稣清楚地把这些事告诉了他们，彼得就把祂拉到一边，劝阻祂。

csbs.text: 耶稣公开地讲这些事，彼得把耶稣拉到一边，开始劝阻他。
